lines.en_lit: on the altar itself, as it is written: “Like the very sky for purity [latohar]”

What is different that sprinkle burnt-offering first and then sprinkle that sin-offering? Let us first sprinkle that sin-offering and then let us sprinkle that burnt-offering. Since is a burnt-offering, takes precedence,
What is different that sprinkle northeast and southwest Let him sprinkle southeast and then northwest say: burnt-offering requires a base, and the southeast corner did not have a base.

What is different that sprinkle northeast and southwest Let him sprinkle southwest and then northeast since the Master said: All turns that you turn should be only to the right. to the east, first he encounters

And from where the Merciful One says with regard to a burnt-offering to perform it the procedure of a sin-offering? Perhaps it is with regard to a sin-offering that the Merciful One says to perform it the procedure of a burnt-offering. not enter your mind, as it is written: “It shall be offered aside from the daily burnt-offering and its libation” What is the Merciful One saying? Cast a matter of the sin-offering upon the burnt-offering,

We learned there: The appointee, said to Go out and bring a lamb from the Chamber of the Lambs, The Chamber of the Lambs was in the northwest corner And there were four chambers there One the Chamber of the Lambs, and one the Chamber of the Seals. And one the Chamber of the Hall of the Hearth, and one the chamber where the shewbread was prepared.

And raises a contradiction Four chambers were into the Hall of the Hearth like small rooms [kitoniyyot] that open into a hall [teraklin]. Two sacred and two were in the non-sacred And the tops of stakes [pispasin] divided between the sacred non-sacred And what serve? southwest was the Chamber of the Sacrificial Lambs;
